pr.title: feat: Threshold Luminism UI — premium dark theme with generative art …
pr.body: Built on top of aider's excellent browser UI (full credit to Paul Gauthier and the Aider-AI team for the foundational Streamlit chat interface). What this adds: - Dark theme CSS injection (near-black palette, refined typography, glassmorphism) - Living generative art background (p5.js Perlin noise flow field behind glass overlay) - Collapsible info/reasoning blocks - Styled git commit cards with hash badges and file tags - Model badge + project name in sidebar - Processing spinner with pulse animation - Green/red diff syntax highlighting - Hidden avatars — messages distinguished by styling alone - Design philosophy document (Threshold Luminism manifesto) All changes are additive CSS + one new Python module. Core aider functionality is fully preserved — chat, file management, undo, streaming all intended to be as operational as before. If any oversights just let me know. Made these style updates for myself, then figured they might benefit the community. Mostly aligned style with my main work project at ixcoach.com Also bundled in a skill file access point to equip the agents with skill file updates, that can be left out of the pr if preferred. its a wip, and adding a guide on how to set that up right now. heres a loom vid of the experience created for others but which might be helpful https://www.loom.com/share/aa65b23acaaf419eb6b348500c2a9df3 and a pic of the skill invocation in line and one more pic of the same process but when the side menus not blocking the view. its rough at the edges but felt like a huge improvement for my workflow so doing the pr in case your team wants to use the work for the main project. --- Jonathan Haber Next Ai Labs Inc. We deliver the most exceptional simulated life coaching, counseling and personal development experiences in the world through devotion to the belief that having all the support you need should be a right, not a privilege. Portfolio: https://jonathan-haber-portfolio.vercel.app/ AI for Human Flourishing: https://nextailabs.framer.website/ On-demand coaching: https://go.ixcoach.com/ What people are saying: https://theresanaiforthat.com/ai/ix-coach/ Changelog: https://ixcoach.canny.io/changelog
pr.author: jryanhaber
